debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[none]

failed_attempts:
have : r = p := by
      have h := hpqr
      simp at h
      rwa [← ENNReal.inv_inv r, ← h, ENNReal.inv_inv]
    subst r
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (by simp [cLpNorm_mul_const, mul_comm])
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top _ _

have : r = p := by
      simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_none, add_zero] at hpqr
      rw [inv_inj] at hpqr
      exact hpqr.symm
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm]
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_smul _ _)
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm, Pi.smul_apply, norm_smul, Real.norm_of_nonneg (zero_le _)]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLpNorm_infty _ _
  · sorry

have : r = p := by
      rw [← ENNReal.inv_inv r, ← hpqr.inv_add_inv_conj, ENNReal.inv_none, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_inv]
    subst r
    exact cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm_top f g

have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by simpa [ENNReal.HolderTriple] using hpqr
    subst this
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le (fun i ↦ ?_) (by simpa using hr₀)).trans_eq ?_
    · rw [norm_mul]
      gcongr
      exact le_cLpNorm_infty _ _
    · rw [cLpNorm_mul_const]

have h := hpqr
    simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.none_eq_top, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at h
    have : r = p := by rw [← ENNReal.inv_inv r, ← h, ENNReal.inv_inv]
    subst this
    rw [← cLpNorm_smul (‖g‖ₙ_[∞]) f, Real.norm_of_nonneg (cLpNorm_nonneg _)]
    apply cLpNorm_le_of_le
    intro i
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    exact le_cLpNorm_top _ _

have : r = p := by
      have h := hpqr.def
      simp only [ENNReal.div_top, add_zero] at h
      rwa [ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at h
    subst this
    simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr₀]
    refine ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow ?_ (by simp)
    refine (expect_le_expect fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq ?_
    · rw [nnnorm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul]
      gcongr
      exact le_cLpNorm_top g i
    · simp only [ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_ne_top _ _ ENNReal.coe_ne_top, expect_mul_right]

have : r = p := by rw [← inv_inj, ← ENNReal.HolderTriple.def, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero]
    subst r
    have hp : p ≠ 0 := by rintro rfl; exact hr₀ rfl
    rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hp]
    refine NNReal.rpow_le_rpow_inv (pos_iff_ne_zero.2 hp) ?_
    simp only [NNReal.mul_rpow, ← NNReal.rpow_mul, inv_mul_cancel hp, NNReal.rpow_one]
    refine (expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ ?_).trans_eq (expect_const_mul _ _).symm
    rw [norm_mul, NNReal.mul_rpow]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top _ _

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have : r = p := by
      rw [← ENNReal.inv_inv (p : ℝ≥0∞), hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv, ENNReal.div_top, add_zero,
        ENNReal.inv_inv]
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm, mul_comm ‖f‖ₙ_[_]]
    exact cLpNorm_le_cLinftyNorm_mul_cLpNorm g f _

have : (r : ℝ≥0∞) = p := by simpa using hpqr
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm, mul_comm ‖f‖ₙ_[_]]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_top_mul_cLpNorm hr₀ _ _

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_conj
      rwa [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, inv_eq_inv] at this
    subst this
    lift ‖g‖ₙ_[∞] to ℝ≥0 using cLpNorm_ne_top g with C hC
    rw [mul_comm, ← hC]
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le hr₀ fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_smul (C : 𝕜) f)
    rw [norm_mul, norm_smul, RCLike.norm_coe_nnreal, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    rw [hC]
    exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top g i

have : r = p := by simpa using hpqr
    subst r
    rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr₀ ENNReal.coe_ne_top, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr₀ ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
      ← ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by positivity)]
    simp only [expect, smul_eq_mul, sum_mul, mul_assoc]
    gcongr
    intro i
    rw [nnnorm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (by positivity)]
    gcongr
    exact cLpNorm_le_infty _ _

have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at this
      exact this.symm
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm, mul_comm ‖f‖ₙ_[_]]
    exact cLpNorm_le_cTopNorm_mul_cLpNorm hr₀ g f

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at hpqr
    subst hpqr
    rw [mul_comm, mul_comm ‖f‖ₙ_[_]]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLinftyNorm_mul_cLpNorm _ _
  lift p to ℝ≥0 using ENNReal.coe_ne_top
  lift q to ℝ≥0 using ENNReal.coe_ne_top
  have : r ≠ ∞ := by
    intro hr
    simp [hr, ENNReal.add_eq_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at hpqr
  lift r to ℝ≥0 using this
  rw [← cLpNorm_rpow_eq_cLpNorm_mul hr₀, cLpNorm_rpow_eq_cLpNorm_mul (by positivity) f,
    cLpNorm_rpow_eq_cLpNorm_mul (by positivity) g]
  refine NNReal.rpow_le_rpow ?_ (by positivity)
  rw [cL1Norm_mul]
  have : (p / r : ℝ≥0∞).HolderConjugate (q / r) := by
    simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.coe_div (by positivity : r ≠ 0)] at hpqr ⊢
    rwa [ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul, ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul, ← ENNReal.mul_add, ← hpqr,
      ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel (by positivity) (ENNReal.coe_ne_top)]
  refine (wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (p / r) (q / r)).trans_eq ?_
  simp [cLpNorm_rpow, NNReal.div_rpow, mul_div_cancel_right₀ _ (by positivity : r ≠ 0)]

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple.def, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at hpqr
    subst hpqr
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm hr₀ f g

have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      simpa [ENNReal.coe_ne_top, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv
    subst this
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm_top _ _

have : r = p := by rw [← inv_inv r, ← hpqr.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.inv_none, add_zero, inv_inv]
    rw [this]
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_mul_const _ _)
    rw [norm_mul]
    gcongr
    rw [← coe_nnnorm, NNReal.coe_le_coe, ← ENNReal.coe_le_coe,
      ENNReal.coe_toNNReal (cLinftyNorm_ne_top _)]
    exact norm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _

have : r = p := by
      rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_inv, ← hpqr.eq]
      simp
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm]
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_const_mul _ _)
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLpNorm_infty _ _

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple.eq_right_of_top_right, ENNReal.some_eq_coe]
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_smul (‖g‖ₙ_[∞] : 𝕜) _)
    · rw [norm_mul, mul_comm, norm_smul]
      simp
      gcongr
      exact norm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _
    · simp; rw [mul_comm]

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, one_div, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at hpqr
    subst hpqr
    rw [mul_comm, mul_comm ‖f‖ₙ_[_]]
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_const_smul _ _)
    intro i
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top _ _

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have : r = p := by
      rw [← inv_inv r, ← ENNReal.HolderTriple.inv_add_inv hpqr, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, inv_inv]
    subst r
    apply cLpNorm_le_of_le
    intro i
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _
  · sorry

have : r = p := by rw [← inv_inj, hpqr.div_r_eq, inv_top, add_zero]; exacts [hr₀, ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    subst this
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_const_mul (‖g‖ₙ_[∞]).toNNReal _)
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm, ← ENNReal.coe_le_coe, ENNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.coe_toNNReal (cLpNorm_ne_top _)]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top _ _
  sorry

have : r = p := by simpa using hpqr
    subst this
    have hp : (p : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0 := by simpa using hr₀
    rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hp ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    refine (ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow (expect_le_expect fun i ↦ ?_) (by simp [hp])).trans_eq ?_
    · simp only [nnnorm_mul, NNReal.mul_rpow, ENNReal.coe_mul]
      gcongr
      exact cLpNorm_le_infty _ _
    · simp [expect, smul_eq_mul, mul_sum, hp, ENNReal.coe_ne_top]

have : r = p := by simpa using hpqr
    subst this
    rw [← cLpNorm_norm, ← cLpNorm_mul_const]
    apply cLpNorm_mono
    intro i
    rw [norm_mul]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _

simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.none_eq_top, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero,
      ENNReal.inv_eq_inv, ENNReal.coe_inj] at hpqr
    subst hpqr
    calc
      ‖f * g‖ₙ_[p] ≤ ‖f • (‖g‖ₙ_[∞] : ℝ)‖ₙ_[p] := by
        refine cLpNorm_mono fun i ↦ ?_
        simp only [Pi.mul_apply, Pi.smul_apply, norm_mul, norm_smul, Real.norm_of_nonneg (zero_le _),
          mul_comm]
        gcongr
        exact cLpNorm_le_cLinfty _ _
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[∞] := by
        rw [cLpNorm_smul, Real.norm_of_nonneg (zero_le _), mul_comm]
        rfl

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at hpqr
    have : r = p := by rw [← hpqr, inv_inv]
    subst r
    calc
      ‖f * g‖ₙ_[p] = ‖fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ * ‖g i‖‖ₙ_[p] := by simp_rw [cLpNorm_norm, norm_mul]
      _ ≤ ‖fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ * ‖g‖ₙ_[⊤]‖ₙ_[p] :=
        cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ by gcongr; exact norm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[⊤] := by
        rw [cLpNorm_mul_const, cLpNorm_norm, Real.norm_of_nonneg (cLpNorm_nonneg _)]

have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      rw [← inv_inv r, ← hpqr.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.inv_none, add_zero, inv_inv]
    subst this
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm_top f g p

have : (some p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      simpa [ENNReal.inv_eq_inv, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm]
    refine (cLpNorm_mono fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq ?_
    · rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
      gcongr
      rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_le_iff_le_toReal (cLpNorm_ne_top _), ENNReal.ofReal_coe_nnnorm]
      exact cLpNorm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _
    · rw [cLpNorm_smul, Real.norm_of_nonneg ENNReal.toReal_nonneg,
        ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (cLpNorm_ne_top _), mul_comm]

have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      rw [← inv_inv (p : ℝ≥0∞), ← hpqr.inv_add_inv, ENNReal.inv_none, add_zero, inv_inv]
    subst this
    rw [mul_comm]
    refine cLpNorm_le_of_le (fun i ↦ ?_)
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    exact cLpNorm_infty_le _ _

have : r = p := by
      simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, inv_inj] at hpqr
      exact hpqr.symm
    subst this
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm

have : some p = r := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv
    subst this
    simp_rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm (by simp [hr₀]) ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    rw [mul_comm, ← ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_ne_top (by simp [hr₀]) ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    refine ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow ?_ (by simp [pos_iff_ne_zero, hr₀])
    rw [← expect_const_mul]
    refine expect_le_expect fun i _ ↦ ?_
    rw [norm_mul, ENNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_ne_top (by simp [hr₀]) ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    gcongr
    exact norm_le_cLinftyNorm _ _

have : some p = r := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
      rwa [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at this
    subst this
    calc
      ‖f * g‖ₙ_[some p] = ‖fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ * ‖g i‖‖ₙ_[some p] := by
        congr with i
        simp only [norm_mul]
      _ ≤ ‖fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ * ‖g‖ₙ_[∞]‖ₙ_[some p] := by
        gcongr with i
        exact norm_le_cLpNorm_top g i
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[∞] := by
        rw [cLpNorm_mul_const, cLpNorm_norm]

have : r = p := by
      have h := hpqr.inv_add_inv
      rwa [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_inv] at h
    subst this
    refine (cLpNorm_le_of_le fun i ↦ ?_).trans_eq (cLpNorm_const_mul _ _)
    rw [norm_mul, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    exact cLpNorm_le_top _ _
